_INSTRUCTIONS: PLACEHOLDER FILE - Replace with your real google-services.json from Firebase Console.
Steps to obtain a real google-services.json:
3. Add an Android app with package name: com.garsal.fitinjector
4. Download the generated google-services.json and replace this file.
Alternatively, if you are NOT using Firebase but only Google APIs:
2. Select your project (must have the Fitness API enabled).
4. Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID of type 'Android'.
- SHA-1: run `keytool -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -list -v` to get debug SHA-1
5. Download or generate google-services.json via the Firebase console linked to the same project.
IMPORTANT: The app WILL NOT BUILD with this placeholder.
The com.google.gms.google-services plugin requires a valid google-services.json.
